name: Shandong Shida Shenghua Chemical Group Company Limited
summary: Shandong Shida Shenghua Chemical Group Company Limited engages in the production and sale of chemical products in China. Its products include methyl tert-butyl ether, propylene oxide, dimethyl carbonate, propylene carbonate, ethylene carbonate, ethyl methyl carbonate and other carbonate products, lithium hexafluorophosphate, and other products. Shandong Shida Shenghua Chemical Group Company Limited was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Dongying, China.
